zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线偏空震荡下行
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD报1549.57美元，24小时下跌1.35%，价格运行于20日均线1578.49下方，显示短期趋势仍由空头主导。盘中高点1571.42未能有效突破均线压制，反映市场买盘力量相对不足，整体维持弱势震荡格局。

从技术指标来看，MACD值为-30.17，处于零轴下方，表明市场动能偏空，中短期下行压力尚未完全释放。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但结合价格持续位于均线下方判断，当前趋势仍偏向空头控制，反弹力度有限。

关键支撑位关注1538美元附近，该位置为日内低点区域，若失守则可能进一步测试1520美元甚至1500美元整数关口。上方阻力位首先位于1571美元，其后为20日均线1578美元区域，突破后才有望改善短线结构。

交易策略方面，短线投资者宜保持谨慎，优先关注反弹至1570-1580美元区域后的表现。激进交易者可考虑顺势高位做空，严格设置止损；稳健交易者则建议等待价格站稳20日均线后再考虑布局多单，以降低趋势交易风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum remains under short-term bearish pressure, trading at 1549.57 and sitting below its 20-day simple moving average of 1578.49. The failure to reclaim the SMA suggests sellers continue to control momentum, while the 24-hour decline of 1.35% reinforces the cautious market tone. Price action is currently positioned near the lower end of the daily range, indicating limited buying conviction and a tendency for rallies to encounter resistance.

Momentum indicators also favor the downside. The MACD value of -30.17 points to negative momentum and confirms that bearish forces remain dominant in the current trend. Although the RSI reading is unavailable, the combination of a declining price structure and a negative MACD suggests that bullish reversals have yet to establish meaningful confirmation. Traders should monitor whether momentum begins to stabilize before anticipating a stronger recovery attempt.

Key support is located around 1538, which represents the session low and an important near-term defensive zone for buyers. A decisive break below this level could expose further downside toward the psychological 1500 area. On the upside, initial resistance appears near 1571, corresponding to the recent daily high, followed by stronger resistance around the 1578–1580 region where the 20-day SMA is currently positioned. A move above this area would improve the short-term technical outlook.

From a trading perspective, conservative participants may prefer to wait for either a confirmed rebound from support or a breakout above resistance before initiating new positions. Aggressive traders could consider short-term bearish opportunities while price remains below the 20-day SMA, using disciplined risk management and protective stop-loss orders. Until Ethereum can reclaim and sustain levels above the moving average, the broader short-term bias remains neutral-to-bearish despite the possibility of temporary relief rallies.
